title: AntiGravity Agent Factory - Professional Solution Schema
description: Formal schema enforcing high-fidelity solution reporting for Plane issue closures. Strictly separates task mechanics from architectural insight.

summary.description: A high-level overview of the problem solved. Must address the business or technical context, not just restate the task title. Minimum 50 characters.

architectural_decisions.description: The deep technical 'Why' and 'How'. Mandates insight into design patterns, algorithms, schemas, or governance rules established during the task.

files_affected.description: List of the critical files modified or created during the task. Use relative paths.

verification.description: Concrete proof that the task hypothesis was successfully tested.

evolution.description: How the factory capabilities or consciousness was expanded. What new schemas, blueprints, patterns, or skills were generated?

notes.description: Optional warnings, follow-up flags, or critical contexts that next agents should observe.
